name: write
description: Write a new journal entry with metadata (title, content, date, topic, mood, tags, location, weather, attachments)

name: confirm
description: Confirm a pending write and apply the journal entry

name: search
description: Search journals by keyword (FTS5), with optional filters for topic, date range, people, mood

name: journal
description: Read one or multiple journals or list recent journals through stable get/batch-get/list JSON contracts

name: index-tree
description: Deterministic Index Tree and Index B navigation: nodes, lens, materialize, freshness, ensure, discover, navigate, entity-neighbor traversal

name: edit
description: Edit existing journal metadata or content fields

name: entity
description: Entity graph management: audit, stats, check, review, merge, delete

name: weather
description: Query weather for a location and return structured weather data

name: index
description: Incremental or full index rebuild for the search engine

name: generate-index
description: Generate index tree files (monthly, yearly, root)

name: abstract
description: Alias for generate-index: generate index tree for a given month

name: backup
description: Backup journal data to a specified destination directory

name: verify
description: Data integrity verification of the journal store

name: timeline
description: Timeline summary stream over a date range

name: on-this-day
description: Historical same-day review across past years

name: recall
description: Deprecated compatibility wrapper over search

name: trajectory
description: Typed observations such as weight, sleep, mood, location, project

name: migrate
description: Schema chain migration with dry-run preview

name: eval
description: Search quality evaluation gate with gold-set fixtures

name: entity-graph-eval
description: Entity graph ablation evaluation

name: maintenance
description: Maintenance cycle dry-run health checks across six subsystems

name: sync-skill
description: Synchronize SKILL.md and references into an existing host agent skill directory

name: smart-search
description: Deterministic search scaffold for host-agent synthesis

name: aggregate
description: Aggregate metrics over a time range with configurable unit and predicate

name: analyze
description: Alias for aggregate: aggregate and analyze metrics over a time range

name: health
description: Installation health check and data audit subcommands

name: version
description: Display version information
